chunks.text: IN HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No.D-1424 of 2024 [Fida Ali v. Province of Sindh & others] PRESENT: MR. JUSTICE ZULFIQAR ALI SANGI MR. JUSTICE ARBAB ALI HAKRO Mr. Irfan Ahmed Qureshi advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Date of hearing & decision: 14.02.2025 O R D E R ZULFIQAR ALI SANGI, J: - Through instant petition filed on 21.09.2024, the petitioner has sought following relief:- a). It be pass order and thereby direct the respondents to issue the record of right of the petitioner’s Survey Nos.539 (1-25 acres), 540 (2-10 acres), total admeasuring 3-35 acres of deh Miano Taluka Hyderabad, District Hyderabad. As the entire Malkano was received by the Government and against such the T.O. Form No.94 dated 03.01.1988 was issued and since that time the red entry is available in the record of right vide entry No.178, Deh Form-VII was not issued on the name of the petitioner and the same may be directed to the respondents to issue the petitioner Form-VII with blue ink pen. b). It be further pass order that if any charges of the same the petitioner is ready to pay the same as prescribed by the rules and regulations. c). Any other relief be deemed fit and proper be granted in favour of the petitioner. 2. Today, learned A.A.G Sindh has placed on record a notification dated 21.10.2024, which reflects that the Government of Sindh has now established a “Public Grievances Redressal Cell” under the Supervision of concerned Deputy Commissioner across the Sindh province to redress the grievance like present petition. 3. Since after issuance of aforementioned notification, the petitioner has an alternate remedy available to approach Public Grievances Redressal Cell, as such, instant petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed.

Today, learned A.A.G Sindh has placed on record a notification dated 21.10.2024, which reflects that the Government of Sindh has now established a “Public Grievances Redressal Cell” under the Supervision of concerned Deputy Commissioner across the Sindh province to redress the grievance like present petition. 3. Since after issuance of aforementioned notification, the petitioner has an alternate remedy available to approach Public Grievances Redressal Cell, as such, instant petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
